description.value:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is incapacitated while in the area of an @UUID[Compendium.elkan5e.elkan5e-spells.Item.Ay9J4z6Zf9hl6d4w]{Antimagic Field}.

If targeted by @UUID[Compendium.elkan5e.elkan5e-spells.Item.oZwKW3I3yzrSdpLE]{Dispel Magic}, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.
